en: Experience Jeju's iconic 60-minute sailing cruise from Daepo Port. Korea's only brand-certified catamaran. Free drinks & unforgettable sunset views.
Set sail on Korea's premier catamaran in Jeju Island. 60 minutes of pure sea breeze, free beverages, and stunning sunset moments.
Discover why Grande Bleu is Jeju's signature yacht experience. Sunset cruises, fishing, and luxury sailing — all in 60 minutes.
Jeju Island's must-do sunset experience. Sail aboard Korea's only certified catamaran from Daepo Port. Free drinks included.
Korea travel essential: Grande Bleu catamaran in Jeju. Sunset sails, sea breeze, free drinks. Book at jejugrandebleuyacht.blogspot.com
Catamaran sailing in Jeju Island — Korea's most authentic yacht tour. Family-friendly, instant booking, brand certified.
Sailing Jeju's southern coast on a brand-certified catamaran. 60-min sunset cruise with complimentary drinks and snacks.
Jeju yacht tour for couples & families. Departing Daepo Port, returning at sunset. Korean hospitality on the open sea.
